start.content: The Void speaks to us all. Can you not hear its whispers in the dark?

options.label: The Void? What do you mean?
I have no time for nonsense.

who.content: We are the listeners. The watchers in the deep. When the world ends, only the Void remains.

void.content: It hungers. It waits. Soon, the Awakening will be upon us. Rejoice, for your end is near.
